title: FAMILY SUPPORT - 211info
text: NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of services to individuals and families, including educational seminars and classes on a variety of topics. Programs focus on family stability and child well-being. Supports youth in their daily connections, emphasizing healthy decision-making. Areas of particular focus include drug, alcohol, and gang prevention as well as positive mental health strategies, including suicide prevention. 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-6377 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Call for information DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Family Support Centers/Outreach Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - CASA ESPERANZA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
